latest_release.name: Version 2.0.1
latest_release.body:
- Fix typos and update docs [[#59](https://github.com/wp-cli/wp-cli-dev/pull/59)]
- Update README to provide a better explanation of setting up [[#56](https://github.com/wp-cli/wp-cli-dev/pull/56)]
- Clean up a couple of PHPCS issues [[#50](https://github.com/wp-cli/wp-cli-dev/pull/50)]
- Provide the location to create a GITHUB_TOKEN [[#46](https://github.com/wp-cli/wp-cli-dev/pull/46)]
- Use proper variable substitution when sending over the GitHub Token [[#43](https://github.com/wp-cli/wp-cli-dev/pull/43)]
- Add `.ignore` to allow searching across all commands in VS Code [[#42](https://github.com/wp-cli/wp-cli-dev/pull/42)]
- Throw an error if `GITHUB_TOKEN` isn't set [[#38](https://github.com/wp-cli/wp-cli-dev/pull/38)]
- Make foreach-bundle a proper shell script [[#36](https://github.com/wp-cli/wp-cli-dev/pull/36)]
- Add a `phpcs.xml.dist` file for PHP file formatting standards [[#35](https://github.com/wp-cli/wp-cli-dev/pull/35)]
- Updated renamed main branch [[#26](https://github.com/wp-cli/wp-cli-dev/pull/26)]
- Use `latest` branch for Roave security advisories [[#22](https://github.com/wp-cli/wp-cli-dev/pull/22)]
- Upgrade to GitHub-native Dependabot [[#21](https://github.com/wp-cli/wp-cli-dev/pull/21)]
- Prevent PHPstorm recursive indexing. [[#19](https://github.com/wp-cli/wp-cli-dev/pull/19)]
